_comment: THE BRAIN's job table + budget policy (ORGANISM_ANATOMY §5). The brain runs HOT by the captain's standing order (12 Jul 2026, with Nidhi): exhaust the Claude Max 5x plan every rolling window and every week; weight the heavy work overnight; protect his study hours; never touch an API key. brain.mjs is the sole reader; edits here are canon edits.

budget._note: Anthropic publishes no exact Max-5x token caps, so these start conservative and SELF-TUNE: any observed limit event records the true ceiling into brain_queue.json (observed_window_ceiling) and the runtime re-fits. The ledger learns the plan's real shape instead of pretending to know it.

guards._note: Hype in output is a bug (CONDUCTOR §1). The API-key guard keeps the hard $100 ceiling: subscription only, ever.

ntfy._note: The organism's mouth on the phone — TWO utterances only, ever: the 08:45 sheet (after formation_read) and the 21:30 full-time bell (ArsenalFC-Bell task). topic stays "" here — the SECRET resolves at runtime from env ARSENAL_NTFY_TOPIC or the gitignored throwin_topic.txt; it is never committed.

gemini._note: Second brain — visualization + long-context. Free CLI on the captain's Google account (the AI Pro one, …2914). ENABLED: until his one-time login, gemini jobs fail gracefully and retry next tick (failed jobs don't spend their daily slot) — the first night after login, the renders just start.

dugout_pool._note: THE THIRD POOL (U3d): live-voice minutes beside Claude-window and Gemini-text. On a heavy voice day (≥threshold minutes in dugout_ledger), DAYTIME gemini jobs step aside so the voice keeps the free-tier pool; they run overnight regardless. Claude jobs unaffected.

jobs._note: M-3 live: runManager({llm}) — the Manager's own validator rejects any invented number; fallback skeleton guarantees the sheet regardless.
Acts through files only — analysis for the wall and the evening; never a ping, never new work.
Clustering ASSIST over doubtminer's parse — output is a proposal file; captain batch-glances; nothing auto-writes to capsules.
Anchor-metaphor assist. Extraction, never invention: validator rejects any anchor text not verbatim-present in the input.
Phrase tomorrow's compiled drills in the DOSSIER register. drills.json stays complete without this — enrichment only.
≤3 insight lines; viz.mjs re-validates before rendering.
The week in evidence lines; words the Boot Room's deterministic proposal — never invents evidence.

Exhaustion filler with real value: pre-draft the Daraar-map probe angles for the NEXT unlocked syllabus concepts, seeded where his cracks historically form. Never shown pre-Pehle-Guess; feeds the Gem prompt pack.
Runs only when scout.json has a staged scrimmage: builds the full R-late mock brief in idle tokens so it sits ready the morning his numbers arrive.

Rich visual HTML from viz's auto-written Wall-Painter prompt (which carries the render laws + last night's design-coach critique); viz.mjs folds it into club/wall_gemini.html ONLY through the sanitizer.
DAILY match poster (SVG) — high-dopamine visible proof, in his own numbers (captain upgraded from weekly).

Resurrects the FORGE's RESERVED viz layer: drafts the per-axis widget/viz spec for the NEWEST locked capsule (mechanism + exact values honored; visual freedom per FORGE_DESIGN). Proposal only — flows into a Claude-Design/Gem session via the captain.

THE SCOUT resurrected (masterplan P6, DOSSIER §9 closed-loop): weekly live scan — 5 most-requested AI-PE skills in India this week, diff vs his current coverage, 3 real postings, every claim cited. Output is a PROPOSAL for OPPONENT_SCOUT.md; never edits canon. Degrades to a no-op if this claude CLI build rejects the tool flag.

THE CLAUDE↔GEMINI LOOP, closing: critique last night's Gemini render against the captain's design laws (one glance = one story; ≤4 working-memory slots; no walls of text; cold-steel-warm-core palette; no hype/streaks/biometrics). Output = ≤10 concrete render-notes; viz.mjs feeds them into the NEXT night's Gemini prompt pack. The wall improves itself nightly, zero taps from the captain.

THE METAMORPHOSIS MINER: mine today's Dugout voice transcripts + notes into (a) capsule-doubt PROPOSALS drafted to the cold-reader standard in HIS words (maine-socha-X-phir-Y; batch-'go' at full-time, never auto-written to the gist), (b) spoken-anchor candidates for the lexicon (verbatim only), (c) calibration/genome evidence observations. His conversations become tomorrow's curriculum — both halves of the cyborg evolve overnight.

THE DAY CARTRIDGE (L3 — the slow brain programs the fast brain across the sleep boundary): compile tomorrow's briefing for the Live voice, ≤15 lines, written TO the Gaffer in second person: yesterday's thread in 3 lines · what he's circling (from the digest) · today's drill focus · one voiced doubt to listen for · anything he asked to carry over. This text is INJECTED into the Dugout's dawn system instruction verbatim. No new numbers, no hype, no calendar pressure.

THE MORNING TEAM TALK (media engine): the Gaffer's 90-second spoken team talk for TOMORROW MORNING — plain spoken prose, NO markdown/lists/emoji, ~220 words, coach register, Hinglish welds natural. Open from the KAL-line if present (his own words), name the set pieces waiting, one earned-and-specific note from the record, close on 'kal phir'. Evidence-based motivation ONLY — every number from the data; thin data = say less, never invent.

THE EVENING TEAM TALK (media engine): the Gaffer's 60–90-second spoken reflection BEFORE full-time — plain spoken prose, no markdown/lists/emoji, ~180 words: what today's data actually says (struggle verdict, which bets resolve tonight), then walk him gently into the 30-second full-time ritual. No verdicts on the man, no shame, evidence only; thin data = shorter talk.

EVENT-TRIGGERED DEEP RE-READ (U4, JARVIS harvest): fires ONLY when a milestone/crisis arms the trigger (postmatch auto-arms every 30th matchday; the captain can arm it any time: node scripts/brain.mjs trigger reanalysis 'reason'). Re-read the season whole — what changed structurally since the start, what this phase actually demands, ≤3 concrete adjustments, all PROPOSALS (nothing auto-acts). Trigger is consumed on success.
